name: clarke
description: CLARKE — Cognitive Learning Augmentation Retrieval Knowledge Engine. Brokered memory and context management for OpenClaw agents.

tenant_id.description: CLARKE tenant ID (auto-generated during install if not set)

project_id.description: CLARKE project ID (auto-generated during install if not set)

context_cache_ttl_seconds.description: How long to cache CLARKE context between LLM calls (seconds)
